agency.name: GF Innovative Solutions
agency.tagline: AI-led marketing operations for ambitious brands

quarter.label: Q2 2026
quarter.theme: From AI demos to AI in production

headline: Q2 is about turning the April 14 workshop into a repeatable inbound channel.
positioningStatement: Every post this quarter should make a reader think: 'these people have actually shipped something - not just demoed it.'
strategy: Use the April 14 workshop as the catalyst. Pre-workshop content drives sign-ups; post-workshop content turns attendees + observers into inbound conversations. May = case studies + agent demos. June = warm into Q3 with a second workshop announcement.

strategicPriorities.label: Workshop pipeline
strategicPriorities.description: April 14 workshop fills, gets recorded, and becomes the centerpiece artifact for Q2 LinkedIn.

strategicPriorities.label: Founder thought leadership
strategicPriorities.description: Martin posts 2-3x/week in first person about what he actually shipped this week. No abstract takes.

strategicPriorities.label: Agent ecosystem reveal
strategicPriorities.description: Otto / Molly / Carlos / Camila / Viktor / Brain get individual showcase posts - each one a real workflow, not vaporware.

strategicPriorities.label: Inbound qualified DMs
strategicPriorities.description: Goal: 2+ qualified inbound DMs/week by end of June. This is the only KPI that converts.

pillars.name: Education
pillars.description: Tactical posts on AI tooling, agent design, integration patterns. The reason people follow.

pillars.name: Case studies
pillars.description: Real workflows we shipped - with screenshots. Builds the 'they actually do it' signal.

pillars.name: Tools & demos
pillars.description: Live demos of Otto, Molly, Carlos, Camila, Viktor, Brain. Each agent gets its own showcase.

pillars.name: Founder POV
pillars.description: Martin in first person - what he tried this week, what worked, what didn't.

monthlyFocus.intent: Use Martin's existing LinkedIn network + a 3-week ramp to fill the April 14 workshop. Every post in weeks 1-3 has the workshop in the CTA.
priorities: Direct CTA on every post for sign-up
monthlyFocus.watch: Workshop sign-ups. Only metric that matters in April.

monthlyFocus.intent: Clip the workshop into 6-8 short posts. Drop one agent-ecosystem showcase per week. Open the Q3 inbound conversations.
priorities: Agent showcase: Otto then Molly then Carlos
monthlyFocus.watch: DM intent + save rate on the agent showcase posts. Posts with engineer-grade detail should over-index on saves.

monthlyFocus.theme: Warm into Q3 with a second workshop date
monthlyFocus.intent: Announce the Q3 workshop (target: late September). Use the May-clipped audience to fill it. Stop chasing reach; chase qualified inbound.
monthlyFocus.watch: Q3 workshop sign-ups in first 7 days + newsletter subscriber growth.

keyDates.title: AI Agents Workshop (live)
keyDates.angle: Centerpiece of Q2. Pre-, during-, and post-content all anchor here.

keyDates.title: Workshop recap publishing
keyDates.angle: First long-form post-workshop. Founder POV, what attendees took away.

keyDates.title: Agent showcase #1 (Otto)
keyDates.angle: Real workflow: Telegram -> N8N -> webinar link. Screenshots, not diagrams.

keyDates.title: Agent showcase #2 (Molly)
keyDates.angle: Email -> sevDesk invoice automation. Concrete time savings claim only if backed by data.

keyDates.title: Q3 workshop early-bird opens
keyDates.angle: First public mention of Q3 date. Drive newsletter sign-ups for full announcement.

keyDates.title: Newsletter inaugural issue
keyDates.angle: First issue. Recap of April workshop + Q3 announcement + one tactical tool comparison.

platforms.name: LinkedIn
platforms.role: Primary - founder voice + qualified inbound DMs
platforms.rationale: German SME decision-makers are here during work hours. Founder thought leadership compounds. Cold outbound is a noisy alternative; we play the long game with content.
watch: Inbound DMs from CTO/Innovation/HR titles at SMEs

platforms.name: YouTube
platforms.role: Secondary - workshop recordings + long-form tool comparisons
platforms.rationale: Workshops get recorded and live here. Search-driven traffic from people Googling 'N8N vs Claude Code'. Lower volume, higher intent.
watch: Subscribers from search vs LinkedIn referrals
